query: I have a physics simulator that takes 3 parameters and produces 100 noisy measurements per run. I want to infer the parameters from real experimental data without running MCMC. Can you set up amortized inference with BayesFlow?

I need to do simulation-based inference for a stochastic epidemiological model where the likelihood is intractable. I can generate simulated outbreaks from the model. How do I train a neural posterior estimator?
I have a pre-simulated bank of 50k parameter-data pairs from a climate model. The simulator takes 2 hours per run so I can't generate on the fly. Can you train BayesFlow offline on this data?
My BayesFlow model has poor calibration — the ECE is 0.15 and the recovery plots look biased. What's going wrong and how do I fix it?

I want to use neural posterior estimation to amortize inference over different experimental designs. Each design gives me a different number of observations (between 10 and 200). How do I handle the varying sample sizes?
I trained a FlowMatching network on simulated data and the loss converged, but when I run inference on real data I get NaN samples. Help me debug this.

I have a generative model for EEG time series and I want to use amortized inference to estimate the underlying neural parameters. The data is sequential, not exchangeable. What architecture should I use?
I need to compare two different summary network architectures for my SBI workflow — a SetTransformer vs a DeepSet. How do I evaluate which one gives better posterior approximations?
I want to do posterior predictive checks after running BayesFlow inference on my real data. How do I generate replicated datasets from the posterior samples?
Can you help me set up a StableConsistencyModel for fast posterior sampling at deployment time? I need sub-millisecond inference for a real-time application.
I need to fit a hierarchical Bayesian model with PyMC to estimate treatment effects across 50 clinics. The model has random slopes and intercepts. Can you set this up?
I want to train a variational autoencoder in PyTorch to generate synthetic images. Can you write the encoder and decoder networks?
I need to run MCMC sampling with Stan to estimate the parameters of an ODE model. Can you write the Stan code?
Help me set up normalizing flows in nflows for density estimation on tabular data. I want to learn the joint distribution of 10 features.
I want to do Bayesian optimization to find the best hyperparameters for my XGBoost model. Can you set up BoTorch for this?
I'm building a causal inference pipeline with DoWhy and econml to estimate heterogeneous treatment effects from an observational study. Can you help me set up the CATE estimator?
Can you help me implement a Gaussian process classifier using GPyTorch for binary classification with uncertainty estimates?
I need to do approximate Bayesian computation (ABC) with rejection sampling to estimate parameters of a population genetics model. Can you write the ABC loop?
I want to forecast monthly revenue using a Bayesian structural time series model in PyMC. I have 5 years of data with trend, seasonality, and a regression component.
Help me build a neural ODE in torchdiffeq to model continuous-time dynamics of a biological system. I have time-course measurements at irregular intervals.
